name: GLM Bridge
description: GLM (Zhipu AI / Z.ai) app-server harness. Reuses the Claude extension's claude-bridge harness — the SAME @zeroaltitude/openclaw-claude-bridge process, unmodified — pointed at Z.ai's Anthropic-compatible endpoint instead of real Anthropic. Gives GLM-5.2 the same streaming/tool-use/dynamic-tools richness as the Claude harness, as a second independent bridge process that can run concurrently with real Claude (openclaw-7ss).

command.description: Executable for the bridge binary. When unset, resolved from the Claude extension's own bundled @zeroaltitude/openclaw-claude-bridge install (this extension has no bridge dependency of its own; it reuses Claude's).

args.description: Extra CLI args for the server.

env.description: Extra env vars injected into the server process. ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL defaults to Z.ai's Anthropic-compatible endpoint; set ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN (or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) here to your Z.ai API key, ideally via a secretRef rather than a literal value.

modelProvider.description: Provider identity stamped onto thread/start + thread/fork and persisted in the session binding. Defaults to 'zai' (unlike the Claude extension's 'anthropic' default) so provider-owned session semantics and cost/catalog lookups correctly attribute GLM turns.

approvalPolicy.description: Codex-shaped approval policy. 'never' bypasses approval gates (the default and equivalent to the legacy bypassPermissions setting).

sandbox.description: Sandbox mode echoed to the server at thread/start.

turnTimeoutMs.description: Hard per-turn timeout in ms. Default lives in code (DEFAULT_CLAUDE_APP_SERVER_TURN_TIMEOUT_MS) so there is one source of truth; omit here to avoid the manifest default shadowing it.

turnIdleTimeoutMs.description: Idle watchdog: fail the turn if no notification arrives for this many ms. Default lives in code.

progressIdleTimeoutMs.description: Progress watchdog: fail the turn if no REAL activity arrives for this many ms while no turn items are in flight. Default lives in code.

subagentProgressIdleTimeoutMs.description: Extended progress watchdog applied only while a native subagent (Agent/Task) is in flight. Default lives in code.

queryThreadTimeoutMs.description: SERVER-enforced (not a consumer watchdog): how long the bridge server keeps a thread's persistent Query/subprocess alive with no turn feeding it before discarding it. Lower this for deployments with many one-shot sessions (heartbeats, cron, subagents) to bound idle subprocess count/memory. Default lives in code (DEFAULT_CLAUDE_APP_SERVER_QUERY_THREAD_TIMEOUT_MS); requires bridge >= 0.3.1.

exclude.description: OpenClaw dynamic tool names to omit when projecting into GLM turns.

appServer.modelProvider.label: Model Provider Identity
appServer.modelProvider.help: Defaults to 'zai'. Only change this if you're pointing the bridge at a different Anthropic-compatible endpoint.

appServer.approvalPolicy.label: Approval Policy
appServer.approvalPolicy.help: 'never' is the openclaw-default unattended posture. Switch to 'untrusted' or 'on-request' to wire the approval-request protocol through OpenClaw's BeforeToolCall hook chain.

appServer.sandbox.label: Sandbox
appServer.sandbox.help: Sandbox mode echoed to the server (the server doesn't enforce this; it's informational at this layer).
